notableEvents.label: Fielding error
notableEvents.detail: Cody Bellinger reaches on a throwing error by second baseman Josh Smith. Cody Bellinger to 2nd.

notableEvents.label: Throwing error
notableEvents.detail: Cody Bellinger reaches on a throwing error by second baseman Josh Smith. Cody Bellinger to 2nd.

notableEvents.label: Sam Haggerty pinch-hit
notableEvents.detail: Sam Haggerty singles on a sharp ground ball to center fielder Trent Grisham.

notableEvents.label: Andrew McCutchen pinch-hit
notableEvents.detail: Andrew McCutchen pops out to second baseman Jazz Chisholm Jr.

notableEvents.label: Andrew McCutchen pinch-hit
notableEvents.detail: Andrew McCutchen reaches on a throwing error by third baseman Ryan McMahon.

notableEvents.label: Andrew McCutchen reached on error
notableEvents.detail: Andrew McCutchen reaches on a throwing error by third baseman Ryan McMahon.

notableEvents.label: Corey Seager GIDP
notableEvents.detail: Umpire reviewed (force play), call on the field was upheld: Corey Seager grounds into a double play, second baseman Jazz Chisholm Jr. to shortstop José Caballero to first baseman Ben Rice. Josh Jung out at 2nd. Corey Seager out at 1st.

notableEvents.label: Corey Seager rally-killer GIDP
notableEvents.detail: Umpire reviewed (force play), call on the field was upheld: Corey Seager grounds into a double play, second baseman Jazz Chisholm Jr. to shortstop José Caballero to first baseman Ben Rice. Josh Jung out at 2nd. Corey Seager out at 1st.
